name: Payment Monitor
summary: Daily overdue sweep + upcoming reminders + aging-bucket overdue alerts + monthly summary.

name: Monthly Report
summary: Monthly retainer report with hours, compliance, health, and upsell hooks.

name: Request Intake
summary: Inbox-to-work-item pipeline with priority, SLA, and client acknowledgment.

name: SLA Scan
summary: Pre-emptive SLA alerts and escalation to clients for severe breaches.

name: Work Execution
summary: Codebase edits within a complexity gate, with commit and completion reply.

name: Booking Intake
summary: Webhook-driven booking + cancellation processing with CRM enrichment and team notification.

name: Post-meeting Follow-up
summary: 24h-after follow-up email with optional human review and CRM deals note.

name: Pre-meeting Reminder
summary: 24h-before reminder email and messaging ping per confirmed meeting.

name: Client Onboarding
summary: Webhook → OTP → knowledge base hub → welcome email → team ping.

name: Phase Monitoring
summary: knowledge base phase detection → milestone email → team update, with send-log dedupe.

name: Portfolio Report
summary: Monthly portfolio metrics with trend deltas, messaging + email delivery.

name: Stall Escalation
summary: Tiered stall escalation across messaging channels, DM, and client email.

name: Calendar Sync
summary: project management → Calendar mirror with create/update/delete and persistent cardId→eventId mapping.

name: Deadline Reminders
summary: 48h / 4h / 15min tiered messaging reminders with deduped per-threshold delivery.

name: Overdue Enforcement
summary: Overdue card detection → Blocked list move + comment + messaging alert, with pattern memory.

name: Inbound Triage
summary: Continuous multi-channel inbound triage with urgency + intent classification.

name: Create or Review
summary: knowledge base task creation with duplicate check + human review queue for low-confidence items.

name: Calendar Watch
summary: Prep reminder + real-time messaging status with idempotent per-event state.

name: Post-meeting Follow-up
summary: Note capture + action-item distribution via email with review gate for multi-attendee meetings.

name: Capture and Route
summary: messaging → classify → spreadsheet/knowledge base route → confirm.

name: Ticket Critical Signals
summary: Auto-create investigation tickets for Critical + persistent-Warning signals, with duplicate detection.

name: Classify and Route
summary: Webhook → three-tier classify → rule match → multi-destination fan-out.

name: Process Responses
summary: spreadsheet poll + scoring + spreadsheet write + messaging broadcast.

name: Send Follow-up Email
summary: Tier-adaptive follow-up email with retry queue.

name: Code Linking
summary: PR / commit discovery + confirmation + Related Code + Related ADRs wiring.

name: Decision Intake
summary: Full ADR creation pipeline with enrichment interview, alternatives matrix, and sign-off gate.

name: Review Cycle
summary: Periodic review with Reaffirm / Re-evaluate / Deprecate decisions and auto-archival.

name: Contract Intake and Analysis
summary: Six-pass analysis producing a structured review record per contract.

name: In-Flight Experiment Significance Watch
summary: Significance gating + promote/revert/archive proposals for in-flight experiments.

name: Threat Analysis & Alerting
summary: Deep analysis + 1-10 threat scoring + messaging alerts + drafted abuse reports per new detection.

name: Spending Check
summary: Weekly billing scan with conditional anomaly-only alerting.

name: Batch Enrichment
summary: Full-database signature mining with confidence-gated auto-updates.

name: Incremental Update
summary: Daily incremental scan that merges fresh signature data into existing contacts.

name: Weekly Freshness Audit
summary: Weekly database health audit with stale-contact flagging and history pruning.

name: Signature Extraction
summary: Continuous email polling with signature parsing, confidence scoring, and database merge.

name: Weekly CRM Audit
summary: Full CRM scan with quality scoring and safe auto-fix application.

name: Database Health Check
summary: Database health scan with unreachability treated as a Critical incident.

name: Deploy Regression Correlation
summary: Cross-reference deploys against error spikes to flag regressions.
